data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the check-in tracking feature, specifically to confirm who arrived and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or data points that indicate check-in tracking is implemented or functioning. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but without concrete evidence of this functionality being fulfilled, it indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of check-in tracking (who arrived, when).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add check-in tracking evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that check-in tracking records who arrived and when.
